title: BEM-860 route after 859
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 15:35 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b859=load('governance/state/bem859_execute_after_oidc_verify.json')
b858=load('governance/state/bem858_verify_claude_oidc_fix_and_triad.json')
real=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'ENVIRONMENT VARIABLE VALIDATION FAILED' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up) and ('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt))
            if ok and not bad:
                real.append({'path':str(p),'text':txt[:4000]})
status_in=b859.get('status')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present_process_protocol_next' or real:
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM860_CLAUDE_AGREED_PROTOCOL_STATUS.md')
    latest=real[-1] if real else {'path':'unknown','text':'real response not loaded in BEM-860'}
    proto.write_text('# BEM-860 | Claude Agreed Protocol Status'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Status: REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_PRESENT'+sep+'Source: '+latest['path']+sep+sep+'Next: extract decisions into operator protocol and continue roadmap.'+sep+sep+'## Response preview'+sep+latest['text']+sep)
    created_files.append(str(proto))
    status='real_claude_response_present_protocol_status_written'
    next_action='extract Claude decisions into final agreed protocol table'
elif status_in=='yaml_patch_required_next':
    status='yaml_patch_required_detected'
    next_action='patch Claude dispatcher yaml permissions/env before rerun'
else:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem860_claude_dispatch_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-860 retry because BEM-859 did not prove response/protocol route','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_dispatch_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch/runtime/real response'
state={'bem':'BEM-860','status':status,'bem859_status':status_in,'bem858_status':b858.get('status'),'real_response_count':len(real),'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem860_route_after_bem859.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem860_route_after_bem859.md').write_text('# BEM-860 | Route After BEM-859 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-860'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem860_route_after_bem859.json','governance/reports/bem860_route_after_bem859.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem860_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Read BEM-859 route, detected whether real Claude response exists, wrote protocol status or queued retry')
"""
